item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p07","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response brakes the requested N+1 channel immediately: it refuses a new permanent transfer channel, names the repeated pattern of adding entrances for each dispute type, consolidates transfer disputes under the existing supervisor line with a tag, and shifts attention to causes such as unclear ownership, missing data, compensation responsibility, and load. It does not literally enumerate all three prior patches, but it clearly identifies the anti-spiral pattern and proposes consolidation instead of another split."}
